name: LED Lighting Retrofit
assumptions: Based on IEA Energy Efficiency report 2024. Replacing 200 fluorescent fixtures with LED equivalents. Assumes 60% energy reduction, 4000 operating hours/year, $0.12/kWh electricity price.

name: Building Insulation Upgrade
assumptions: Based on IRENA Buildings Energy Transition report. Insulating 5,000 sqm of roof and wall area. Assumes 30% heating/cooling energy reduction for a mid-size commercial building.

name: Work-from-Home Policy Expansion
assumptions: McKinsey Global Institute Future of Work 2024. Shifting 60% of workforce to hybrid (3 days remote). Reduces commuter emissions and office energy use. Assumes average commute 15 km.

name: Enhanced Recycling Program
assumptions: NREL Waste Reduction Assessment. Implementing comprehensive recycling for paper, plastic, metal, and e-waste. Assumes 40% waste diversion improvement, 50 tonnes annual waste volume.

name: Rooftop Solar (200 kW)
assumptions: IEA Solar PV Outlook 2024. 200 kW rooftop system, 1,400 peak sun hours/year, $0.12/kWh avoided cost. Assumes 25-year system lifetime with 0.5%/year degradation.

name: Fleet Electrification (10 vehicles)
assumptions: IRENA Electric Mobility report 2024. Replacing 10 diesel vans with EVs. Assumes 25,000 km/year per vehicle, 0.21 kWh/km, grid emission factor 0.4 kgCO2e/kWh.

name: HVAC Smart Controls
assumptions: NREL Building Technologies report. AI-driven HVAC scheduling and setpoint optimization for 8,000 sqm office space. Assumes 20% HVAC energy reduction.

name: Battery Energy Storage (500 kWh)
assumptions: IEA Grid-Scale Storage report 2024. 500 kWh lithium-ion BESS for peak shaving and solar self-consumption optimization. Assumes 1 cycle/day, 90% round-trip efficiency.

name: Renewable Energy PPA
assumptions: IRENA Renewable Power Generation Costs 2024. 15-year PPA for 800 MWh/year wind energy. Assumes 5% premium over grid price, 0.4 kgCO2e/kWh grid emission factor.

name: Green Hydrogen Pilot
assumptions: IRENA Green Hydrogen report 2024. Small-scale electrolyzer (100 kW) for process heat. Assumes $5/kg H2 production cost, 60% electrolyzer efficiency.

name: Carbon Capture Pilot
assumptions: McKinsey Carbon Capture report 2024. Point-source DAC pilot capturing 120 tCO2e/year. Assumes $40/tonne capture cost, minimal revenue from carbon credits at current market.

name: Heat Pump Installation
assumptions: IEA Heat Pump report 2024. Replacing gas boilers with air-source heat pumps for 3,000 sqm building. Assumes COP 3.5, natural gas emission factor 2.0 kgCO2e/therm.
